findings.location: s1 — アップロードファイルの取得方法（サーバサイド）
findings.description: The empty-file check pattern is omitted. The source shows that after calling `req.getPart("userList")`, the implementation should check `if (partInfoList.isEmpty())` and throw `ApplicationException` (with `MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG00039")`) when no file was uploaded. Without this check, calling `partInfoList.get(0)` on an empty list causes an IndexOutOfBoundsException. This is a decision-necessary implementation pattern for correct error handling.
findings.source_evidence: Source section アップロードファイルの取得方法（サーバサイド）: `if (partInfoList.isEmpty()) { throw new ApplicationException(MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG00039")); }` with comment `// ファイルがアップロードされていことを確認`

findings.description: Section s6 has an empty title (`"title": ""`) and content `"なし"` (2 characters, well below the 50-character minimum). The corresponding source element is only an RST anchor (`.. _`custom_tag_paging`:`) followed by a horizontal rule — a page boundary marker with no substantive content. Representing this as a knowledge section with paging-related hints (`"ページング"`, `"custom_tag_paging"`) could mislead an AI agent into expecting paging content in this file.
findings.source_evidence: End of source file: `.. _`custom_tag_paging`:\n\n----...` — this is solely an anchor/boundary marker with no explanatory content.
